Section Title: ... > [Mobile Recording SDK](https://www.recall.ai/product/mobile-recording-sdk)
Content:
Meeting Bot API
Ideal For
Recording virtual meetings (eg. Zoom, Google Meet)
Explicit recording consent notification
Building interactive meeting agents
See our Meeting Bot API
Desktop Recording SDK
Ideal For
Recording virtual or in-person meetings
A stealthier recording experience
Building into an existing desktop app
See our Desktop SDK
Mobile Recording SDK
Ideal For
Recording in-person meetings or phone calls
Recording system audio on your phone
Building into an existing mobile app
See our Mobile SDK

results.title: Gabscriber: Real-Time Speech To Text Transcription | LinkedIn
excerpts:
Section Title: Gabscriber: Real-Time Speech To Text Transcription > Updates
Content:
postUnlock Productivity with AI-Powered Voice Transcription
Typing is yesterday’s tool. Today, professionals are turning to AI-powered dictation to streamline their workflow and boost output. Meet Gabscriber — a Windows app that uses Microsoft’s cutting-edge speech recognition technology to transcribe your voice into text in real time. Why it matters:
✅ Speeds up content creation
✅ Reduces physical strain from typing
✅ Helps you multitask effectively
✅ Great for writers, execs, academics & more
Powered by Microsoft’s robust AI and machine learning models, Gabscriber adapts to your speech patterns and even works in noisy environments. 🎯 Think faster. Work smarter. Speak freely.
 ...

Content:
Day? Here’s a Smart Shortcut. 🧠💬
Meet your new time-saving sidekick: Gabscriber — the voice-to-text app powered by Microsoft’s powerful AI speech recognition. Our article dives into how Gabscriber makes life easier for busy people by turning speech into text in real time — with no complex setup or tech skills needed. 💡 You’ll learn:
🗣️ How Microsoft’s speech tech understands your voice
🚀 How Gabscriber boosts focus and saves hours
💼 Why it’s a must-have for professionals, students & creators
💬 If you’ve got something to say, Gabscriber’s ready to type it.

Content:
Voice = Your New Productivity Hack ⚡
What happens when Microsoft’s advanced speech recognition meets a sleek, easy-to-use app? You get Gabscriber — a voice-to-text tool that’s changing how people get things done. 🧠 In our article, we explore how AI and machine learning power real-time transcription and boost productivity across industries. ✔️ Discover how Microsoft’s speech tech works
✔️ See how Gabscriber uses it to deliver fast, real-time accurate transcriptions
✔️ Learn how students, pros, and creatives are using it to get ahead
📲 Stop typing. Start talking.

results.title: Looking for real-time speech recognition alternative to Web ... - Reddit
excerpts:
Section Title: Looking for real-time speech recognition alternative to Web Speech API (need accurate repetition ...
Content:
I'm building a browser-based dental app that uses voice input to fill a periodontal chart. We started with the Web Speech API, but it has a critical flaw: when users say short repeated inputs (like “0 0 0”), the final repetition often gets dropped — likely due to noise suppression or endpointing heuristics.
Azure Speech handles this well, but it's too expensive for us long term.
What we need:
Real-time (or near real-time) transcription
Accurate handling of **repeated short phrases** (like numbers or "yes yes yes")
Ideally browser-based (or easy to integrate with a web app)
Cost-effective or open-source
We've looked into:
**Groq** (very fast Whisper inference, but not real-time)
**Whisper.cpp** (great but not ideal for low-latency streaming)
**Vosk (WASM)** — seems promising, but I’m looking for more input
**Deepgram** and **AssemblyAI** — solid APIs but trying to evaluate tradeoffs
